description: Themed bundle of 8 open issues filed in the upstream parent project manaflow-ai/cmux affecting input handling. These are NOT c11 issue numbers; every #N in this ticket refers to an issue in manaflow-ai/cmux. Picks: #3061, #1456, #3096, #3069, #1469, #1153, #2105, #2949. Reporters to credit: @wada811, @DaikiHayata, @tmad4000, @jewel-sallylab, @alceal, @sldx, @freshtonic, @shaun0927. Plus related-issue reporters whose duplicates close with the same fix: @AndreySoloviev (#2756), @pankrusheff (#2891). Full rationale and per-pick credits in task note.
title: Upstream cmux issues: Input handling, keyboard, IME, paste, clipboard, signals (8 picks)
